zh.lifeSummary: Jon Gurdon是William John Gurdon的兒子，於1285年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆。他和Anne Coleman至少有1個女兒。他去世於1356年4月27日在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Gurdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Jon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Jon Gurdon was born in 1285, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of William John Gurdon. He had at least 1 daughter with Anne Coleman. He died on 27 April 1356, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Jon Gurdonは1285年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでWilliam John Gurdonの息子として生まれた。彼はAnne Colemanとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1356年4月27日にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jon Gurdon(은)는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 William John Gurdon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Anne Coleman(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Jon Gurdon родился в 1285 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William John Gurdon. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Anne Coleman. Он умер 27 апреля 1356 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
